name: Chicken Marinated with Grapefruit
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Skinned And Boned Chicken - Pieces
1 tsp Chopped Fresh Thyme OR 1/2 tsp Dried Thyme, Crushed
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 4 To 6 Servings
1. Wash the chicken pieces and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Place the chicken in a baking dish and set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients, blending well.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken and cover.
5. Refrigerate for 6 hours or better, overnight. Turn once or twice.
6. Preheat the oven to 350 Degrees F (175 Degrees C).
7. Remove the chicken from the refrigerator and drain, reserving the marinade.
8. Bake the chicken, basting with some of the marinade from time to time, for 1 1/4 hours or until fork tender.
9. Serve with boiled rice and beans.
NOTE: This marinade works well for charcoal grilled chicken as well.
